title: bupleurum stellatum var. typicum
intro: Bupleurum stellatum var. typicum, also known as Starry Hare's Ear, is a plant species within the Bupleurum genus. It is a perennial herb that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to East Asia. Bupleurum stellatum var. typicum is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal activities. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
